title: Cochleanthes wailesiana

intro: Cochleanthes wailesiana, also known as Wailes' orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae) native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The health benefits of Cochleanthes wailesiana include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues.
